hero_headline: Building intelligent systems that turn raw data into production-ready AI applications.
about: Pawan Choudhary is an emerging AI/ML engineer with a strong foundation in Python and machine learning pipelines. He specialises in building end-to-end AI applications and has demonstrated initiative through independent open-source projects. Pawan is well positioned for junior to mid-level roles in AI application development and backend engineering.

projects.title: AI Portfolio Generator
projects.problem: Job seekers struggle to turn a static PDF resume into a credible, deployable personal website.
projects.outcome: Converts a PDF resume into a structured, ready-to-deploy portfolio site end to end.

projects.title: FastAPI Microservice
projects.problem: Needed a reproducible way to demonstrate cloud-native engineering practices in a portfolio piece.
projects.outcome: Containerised REST API with automated CI/CD deployment.

projects.title: Open-source ML Contribution
projects.problem: A scikit-learn extension library lacked sufficient documentation and test coverage.
projects.outcome: Improved documentation and added unit tests as an active open-source contributor.
